text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I wander through these modern, thoughtfully designed halls. There is a sterile clarity here, an environment cultivated for focus and innovation. The R+D wall, ablaze with color and bold text, invites me to ponder the future—a space where humanity and machines are intertwined in constant dialogue. Bathed in synthetic light, I feel small but stimulated, my mind teetering between questioning and awe.
